title: Tim Gould Promoted to President of Ahtna Engineering Services, LLC
summary: FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Anchorage, Alaska – Ahtna, Inc. is pleased to announce that Timothy F. Gould, PE, has been promoted to president of subsidiary Ahtna Engineering Services, LLC (AES). Gould has served as the vice president of AES and Ahtna Environmental, Inc. since 2014. Gould’s experience spans...
